title: Golden Whitewood
description: A resource pack that changes the texture of the chest.
body:
A resource pack that changes the texture of the chest.

If you’re tired of the classic chest texture and want something fresh, the Golden Whitewood Resource Pack is just what you need.

⚙️ Setup
Open Minecraft and go to Settings → Resource Packs.
Drag and drop the Craft Gallery pack into the folder.
Activate the pack and enjoy your new collection of classic paintings in-game.
